title: Training Record
description: Structured resistance and performance training programming, progression, and recovery state. Complements lifestyle.json which handles general movement (walking, recreational sports, non-programmed activity). Populate only what the user actually tracks — all sections are optional.

current_program.description: What the user is on right now. Single current program; prior programs go in phase_history.

name.description: Program name — e.g., 'PPL 6-day', '5/3/1 BBB', 'custom hypertrophy block'

type.description: powerlifting | bodybuilding | general-strength | sport-specific | calisthenics | endurance | hybrid

split.description: upper/lower | push/pull/legs | full body | body part | other

frequency.description: Training days per week — e.g., '4', '6', '3 with optional 4th'

duration.description: How long on this program — e.g., '8 weeks', '3 months'

current_phase.description: accumulation | intensification | deload | cut | bulk | maintenance | peaking | rehab

weekly_volume.description: Volume as user tracks it — sets per muscle per week, total weekly sets, or descriptive (high/moderate/low)

intensity_style.description: RPE-based | %1RM-based | AMRAP | fixed load | autoregulated | other

progression_model.description: linear weight | DUP | block periodization | autoregulated RPE | LP with deloads | undulating

modifications.description: Exercise substitutions or adaptations — e.g., 'front squat instead of back squat due to lower back'

key_lifts.description: Longitudinal tracking of primary lifts — the main movements the user cares about progressing on

lift.description: Canonical lift name — squat, bench, deadlift, OHP, front squat, RDL, pull-up, etc.

current_working_weight.description: Most recent typical working weight with rep scheme — e.g., '315 x 5', '225 x 8'

history.description: Append-only progression log. Append new entries; never modify old.

context.description: PR attempt | regular session | deload week | return from break | injury modification

phase_history.description: Append-only log of training phase transitions — captures longitudinal context for correlating training periods with outcomes

phase.description: cut | bulk | maintenance | hypertrophy-block | strength-block | peaking | deload | rehab | off-season | in-season

recovery_indicators.description: Subjective and objective recovery state. HRV and subjective recovery may correlate with intervention effects when relevant interventions are active.

hrv_tracking.description: Is the user tracking HRV (via wearable or manual)?

recent_hrv_trend.description: improving | stable | declining | noisy — qualitative trend over recent weeks

subjective_recovery.description: How well-recovered between sessions generally — 1-10 rating or qualitative

sleep_quality_context.description: Cross-reference to lifestyle.json sleep if recovery is sleep-limited

readiness_protocol.description: How the user decides daily training — autoregulation method, HRV threshold, subjective check-in

adherence_log.description: Optional per-week adherence tracking. Useful for evaluating whether plateau is about programming/intervention or about execution.

week_of.description: ISO date of Monday (or user's week-start convention)

injuries_and_limitations.description: Ongoing physical limitations that affect training and whose status may inform intervention reasoning (e.g., recovery interventions, hormone optimization, regenerative protocols)

area.description: Body area or joint affected — lower back, right shoulder, left knee, etc.

affects_lifts.description: Which lifts this injury modifies or prevents

current_modification.description: Current exercise substitution or volume reduction
